arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso responds to Real Madrid rumours amid speculation over Carlo Ancelotti's future
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso responds to rumours linking him with the Real Madrid job following fresh reports regarding Carlo Ancelotti's future.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso responds to Real Madrid question after Carlo Ancelotti claims
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti is rumoured to have decided to leave his post at the end of season, sparking speculation that Xabi Alonso will be brought in to replace him

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso reacts to Real Madrid job speculation amid rising rumours

arts.ttl: Champions League | Predicted Atlético Madrid v Bayer Leverkusen XIs – Xabi Alonso to make several changes
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso could make up to five changes to his Bayer Leverkusen side ahead of their Champions League against Atlético Madrid at the Wanda Metropolitano on Tuesday night. Lukas Hradecky,…

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone responds to recent digs from Real Madrid pair
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid head coach Diego Simeone has on Monday responded to the recent jibes aimed at he and his team on the part of Real Madrid pair Carlo Ancelotti and…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen recieve a boost ahead of Atlético Madrid clash as key star returns to training
arts.sum: As reported by our colleagues at Get German Football News, Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface has returned to training ahead of his side’s clash against Atlético Madrid on Tuesday evening.…

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface returns to team training for Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Ahead of their Champions League league phase game against Atletico Madrid on Tuesday evening, Victor Boniface has returned to team training for Bayer Leverkusen. The Nigerian has been out with a…

arts.ttl: Champions League Preview: Atletico Madrid vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will be looking to extend their 12-game winning streak in all competitions on Tuesday, as they travel to Spain to take on Atletico Madrid in the Champions League.…

arts.ttl: Simeone & Barrios underline desire to reach Champions League final ahead of Leverkusen clash
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid put forward coach Diego Simeone and midfielder Pablo Barrios to address the press ahead of Tuesday’s UEFA Champions League clash with Bayer Leverkusen at the Estadio Riyadh Air Metropolitano, addressing a number of topics including Europe’s elite competition. “It is the objective of all the teams that participate, and we are one of them,” the coach replied when asked whether winning the tournament was of particular importance for Atlético Madrid.
